NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS EF0 TORNADO OVER SEBAGO LAKE IN CUMBERLAND COUNTY MAINE. MINIMAL DAMAGE OCCURRED OVER LAND BUT NUMEROUS EYEWITNESS REPORTS... PICTURES... AND VIDEOS OF A WATERSPOUT JUST OFFSHORE OF EAST SEBAGO CONFIRM A TORNADO. MAXIMUM WINDS WERE ESTIMATED AT 75 MPH.
PONTOON BOAT FLIPPED ON SHORE ROAD. SEVERAL OTHER BOATS HAD COVERS AND TOPS SHREDDED. LAWN FURNITURE TORN OFF DECKS AND THROWN INTO THE LAKE
TREES DOWN BLOCKINNG 302
TWITTER PHOTO SHOWS WATERSPOUT OVER SEBAGO LAKE. TAKEN FROM LONG BEACH LOOKING EAST.

NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS EF1 TORNADO IN BRIDGTON MAINE. DAMAGE INCLUDED SNAPPED AND UPROOTED TREES AS WELL AS TOPPLED POWER POLES. A DOCK WAS ALSO DAMAGED BY THE DOWNED TREES. THIS DAMAGE WAS CONSISTENT WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 100 MPH.

NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS EF1 TORNADO IN DENMARK MAINE. DOZENS OF SNAPPED AND UPROOTED TREES. DAMAGED TREES FELL ONTO AT LEAST ONE VEHICLE... MULTIPLE CABINS... AND AT LEAST ONE BOAT AND DOCK CAUSING SUBSTANTIAL DAMAGE. THIS DAMAGE WAS CONSISTENT WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 95 MPH.
CONCENTRATED AREA OF DAMAGE TO TREES AND HOMES AT MOUNTAIN ROAD AND TRAIL CIRCLE
JOHNSON BROOK IS OUT OF ITS BANKS. ROUTE 175 IS CLOSED DUE TO FLOODING.

*** 1 INJ *** NWS STORM SURVEY CONFIRMS EF1 TORNADO IN BRIDGTON MAINE. NUMEROUS HARD AND SOFTWOOD TREED WERE UPROOTED AND SNAPPED AT TREE BASE. SOME OF THESE TREES WERE OVER TWO FEET IN DIAMETER. MANY STRUCTURES AND VEHICLES WERE DAMAGED OR DESTROYED BY THE FALLING TREES. ONE MINOR INJURY OCCURRED DUE TO A PERSON BEING CUT BY GLASS. DAMAGE WAS CONSISTENT WITH MAXIMUM WINDS OF 110 MPH.
